title: serratula decurrens
intro: Serratula decurrens, also known as the creeping burnet, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Serratula decurrens include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in the form of salves and poultices.
